scripts.link: pushd dist\v2 && npm install && popd && pushd dist\v3 && npm install && popd
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run compile && npm run copy && npm run link
scripts.vsix:preview: tfx extension create --output-path _package/advinst-vsts-task-preview.vsix --extension-id AdvancedInstaller-Preview --override {\"name\":\"Preview Advanced Installer \", \"publisher\":\"caphyon-test\"}
scripts.package:release: rimraf _package/advinst-vsts-task-release.vsix && npm run build && npm run vsix:release
scripts.package:preview: rimraf _package/advinst-vsts-task-preview.vsix && npm run build && npm run vsix:preview
